# People, Conf, and journals

*Original link:* http://yamlb.wordpress.com/2006/02/15/people-conf-and-journals/  
*pubDate:* Wed, 15 Feb 2006 16:19:25 +0000  
*post_id:* 23  
*status:* publish  
*type:* post

**Content (verbatim)**

Who are the main authors in bayesian ML ?
What are the main conferences and journals.
I list what I have in mind at this moment.

**Where to start**
If you want to start with bayesian ml, I propose to look at

- [UCL course (Ghahramani)](http://www.gatsby.ucl.ac.uk/~zoubin/course05/index.html)
- [Papers from T.Minka](http://research.microsoft.com/~minka/papers/)

**Authors**

- Zoubin Ghahramani
- Radford Neal 
- Tom Minka
- David McKay

**Conferences**

- NIPS
- CVPR
- UAI
- ICML

**Journals**

- JMLR
- Machine Learning
- Bayesian Analysis
